title: Record a Synth Melody
description: Learn to record notes in real-time using the synth tracks.

steps.title: Select Synth Track 1
steps.instruction: Press the Synth 1 button to select the first synthesizer track.

steps.title: Find a Sound
steps.instruction: Double-tap the Synth 1 button to enter the patch browser. Press pads to preview sounds, then press Synth 1 again to select.
steps.tip: Turn Macro 1 to scroll through more patches.

steps.title: Test the Pads
steps.instruction: Play some notes on the pads. They're arranged chromatically. Use Octave +/- to change octaves.

steps.title: Enable Recording
steps.instruction: Press the Record button. It will light red to show recording is armed.
steps.warning: Don't press Play yet - you can record while stopped.

steps.title: Record Your Melody
steps.instruction: Press Play to start the sequence, then play notes on the pads. Your notes will be recorded and quantized to the steps.
steps.tip: If you make a mistake, press Shift + Octave Down to undo.

steps.title: Stop Recording
steps.instruction: Press Record again to disable recording. Your melody will continue to loop.

outcomes: A recorded synth melody that loops
